## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX teams to discuss content performance, ongoing tasks, and upcoming priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance remains strong post-migration, with exceptionally high engagement rates (96%)](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [44 articles awaiting review; 10 published last week without issues](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Team restructuring: Ismail replacing Usman as primary point of contact for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [Ongoing tasks: internal audit, manual link/UX audit, image audit (10/week), and resolving TOC scrollability](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Analytics

  - [Traffic holding steady post-migration; slight decline from peak, expected to improve with internal linking fixes](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Google remains top traffic driver](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Engaged sessions at 96% (benchmark: 50-60%)](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [Defined as \>1 min dwell time or clicking to another page](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic: 190 sessions (slight drop from 238 peak)](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [Top pages: AC testing, metrics, multimodal AI](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [GA4 replaced bounce rate with engagement rate](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)

### Ongoing Content Audits and Improvements

  - [Internal audit in progress](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Manual link/UX audit for identified URLs, completion expected by Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
      - [Publishing fixes to staging website](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Image audit of non-GrowthX blogs: 10/week](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [Jackson to provide older assets from Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [robots.txt issue:](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
      - [Affects crawl budget, not critical](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [Decision: Monitor in Search Console, revisit in a month if needed](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

### Team Updates and Workflow

  - [Jackson working on SEO/SME feedback guidelines for dev team](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Team restructure: Ismail replacing Usman as primary GrowthX contact](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [TOC scrollability ticket needs follow-up (assigned but no response)](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Review 1-2 new blogs for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [Follow up on image audit from old blogs (10/week)](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
      - [Push TOC scrollability ticket to completion](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [GrowthX to:](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [Continue internal and manual link/UX audits](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
      - [Prepare for Ismail's transition as primary contact](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
      - [Monitor crawl budget in Search Console re: robots.txt issue](https://fathom.video/share/jYKtAM8Y_JZqG5H8xS9pgzJEMa39Bz-5?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
